0.content:
# Cisco ASA Firewall Analysis

Real-time visibility into Cisco Secure Firewall ASA syslog messages. Logs are generated by the **Cisco ASA Firewall Log Generator** workflow every 5 minutes covering connection events (302013/14/15/16), ACL deny/permit (106023/106100), port blocks (710003), and VPN/AAA events (113039/113019/113005).

`log.source == "cisco-asa"`

1.title: 1. All Cisco ASA Logs — Overview
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| fields timestamp,
         cisco.message_id,
         cisco.action,
         cisco.src_ip,
         cisco.dst_ip,
         cisco.protocol,
         cisco.src_port,
         cisco.dst_port,
         cisco.acl_name,
         cisco.user,
         cisco.reason,
         hostname
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

2.title: 2. Denied / Blocked Events
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter in(cisco.action, "deny", "auth-failed")
| fields timestamp,
         cisco.message_id,
         cisco.action,
         cisco.src_ip,
         cisco.dst_ip,
         cisco.protocol,
         cisco.dst_port,
         cisco.acl_name,
         cisco.user
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

3.title: 3. Permitted / Connected Events
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter in(cisco.action, "permit", "built")
| fields timestamp,
         cisco.message_id,
         cisco.action,
         cisco.src_ip,
         cisco.dst_ip,
         cisco.protocol,
         cisco.dst_port,
         cisco.acl_name,
         cisco.connection_id
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

4.title: 4. Event Summary — Deny vs Permit
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| fieldsAdd is_blocked = in(cisco.action, "deny", "auth-failed")
| summarize total = count(),
            denied = countIf(is_blocked),
            permitted = countIf(NOT is_blocked)
| fieldsAdd denied_pct = round(toDouble(denied) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1),
            permitted_pct = round(toDouble(permitted) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)

5.title: 5. Denied by ACL Name
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter cisco.message_id == "106023"
| summarize deny_count = count(),
            unique_sources = countDistinct(cisco.src_ip),
            unique_ports = countDistinct(cisco.dst_port),
            by: { cisco.acl_name }
| sort deny_count desc

6.title: 6. Denied by Destination Port
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter in(cisco.action, "deny")
| summarize deny_count = count(),
            protocols = collectDistinct(cisco.protocol),
            by: { cisco.dst_port }
| sort deny_count desc
| limit 15

7.title: 7. Events by Message ID
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| summarize count = count(),
            by: { cisco.message_id }
| sort count desc

8.title: 8. VPN Session Analysis
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter in(cisco.message_id, "113039", "113019", "113005")
| summarize total = count(),
            started = countIf(cisco.message_id == "113039"),
            disconnected = countIf(cisco.message_id == "113019"),
            auth_failed = countIf(cisco.message_id == "113005"),
            by: { cisco.group }
| sort total desc

9.title: 9. Top Denied Source IPs
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter in(cisco.action, "deny", "auth-failed")
| summarize deny_count = count(),
            targets = countDistinct(cisco.dst_ip),
            msg_ids = collectDistinct(cisco.message_id),
            by: { cisco.src_ip }
| sort deny_count desc
| limit 20

10.title: 10. Top Targeted Destination IPs
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter in(cisco.action, "deny")
| summarize deny_count = count(),
            attacking_sources = countDistinct(cisco.src_ip),
            ports_targeted = collectDistinct(cisco.dst_port),
            by: { cisco.dst_ip }
| sort deny_count desc
| limit 20

11.title: 11. Security Events Over Time
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| fieldsAdd is_security = in(cisco.action, "deny", "auth-failed")
| makeTimeseries security_events = countIf(is_security),
                 normal_events = countIf(NOT is_security),
                 interval: 5m

12.title: 12. High-Risk Port Blocks
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter in(cisco.action, "deny")
| filter cisco.dst_port == 3389
     OR cisco.dst_port == 1433
     OR cisco.dst_port == 445
     OR cisco.dst_port == 23
     OR cisco.dst_port == 21
     OR cisco.dst_port == 22
| fields timestamp,
         cisco.src_ip,
         cisco.dst_ip,
         cisco.dst_port,
         cisco.protocol,
         cisco.action,
         cisco.acl_name,
         cisco.message_id
| sort timestamp desc

13.title: 13. Connection Teardown Reason Breakdown
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter cisco.message_id == "302014"
| summarize count = count(),
            by: { cisco.reason, cisco.protocol }
| sort count desc

14.title: 14. VPN Disconnects by Reason and Group
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "cisco-asa"
| filter cisco.message_id == "113019"
| summarize count = count(),
            unique_users = countDistinct(cisco.user),
            by: { cisco.reason, cisco.group }
| sort count desc
